scenario: The history museum looks wonderful. You go to the ticket desk.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Hello! How many tickets?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Two tickets, please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: That will be twenty thousand som.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Here is the money.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Thank you! The museum is open until six.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Great, thank you!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Is there a student discount?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Yes — do you have your student card?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Here is the card.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Good. The ticket is five thousand som.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Two tickets, please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Sorry, today is Monday. The museum is closed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: When is it open?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Tomorrow, from nine.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Fine, we will come tomorrow.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Mana chiptalar. Suratga olish mumkin emas.
turns.english: Here are the tickets. Taking photos is not allowed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Not even without flash, with a phone?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: In the first hall it is allowed, in the others no.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Understood, thank you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Is there a tour in English?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Yes, it starts at eleven.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: For two people, please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Fine. Wait in the first hall.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you!

variants.description: Card machine is broken — cash only

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Kechirasiz, karta ishlamayapti. Faqat naqd pul.
turns.english: Sorry, the card machine is not working. Cash only.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I have no cash. Where is an ATM?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Next to the museum, on the left.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I will be back in five minutes!

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: We will wait!

scenario: Inside the museum, a friendly guide notices your interest in a beautiful old painting.

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Bu rasm juda chiroyli! Bu nima?
turns.english: This painting is very beautiful! What is it?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Bu eski Samarqand. Ikki yuz yillik rasm.
turns.english: It is old Samarkand. A two-hundred-year-old painting.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Who is the artist?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.uzbek: Mashhur usta. Mana bu zal ham uniki.
turns.english: A famous master. This hall is also his.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Very interesting. Thank you!

variants.description: The silk room is the highlight

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Have you seen the silk hall?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Not yet. Where is it?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: On the second floor. The most beautiful hall!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I will go now. Thank you!

variants.description: You ask about the blue ceramics

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Where are these ceramic dishes from?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: From Rishtan. The blue colour is famous.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Can I buy one somewhere?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: The museum shop has them. On the first floor.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Wonderful! Thank you!

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Excuse me, the museum closes in ten minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Oh! May I see the last hall?

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: If you are quick, yes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you! I will look quickly.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Where have you come from?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I came from England.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Do you like our history?

turns.speaker: user
turns.uzbek: Juda yoqdi. Tarix boy va qiziq.
turns.english: Very much. The history is rich and interesting.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.english: Thank you! Come again!
